since_last: 51% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.84%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: BTC +0.56% · Gold +0.99% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 51% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.84%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.84%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.00%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +5.32%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +5.32%, TER +5.07%, AMAT +5.00%, KLAC +4.80%, MU +4.65%. Laggards: CRM -4.55%, IBM -4.24%, NOW -3.82%, EQIX -3.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.97% at $149.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.97% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
